name: Gai Paht Meht Mamuang Himapahn (Chicken Stir2
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound Chicken breast, boned and skinned, cut into 1/2 inch strips
1 small Onion, peeled and cut into thick wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok over medium heat. Add the oil.
2. Add the dried red chilies and stir fry for 1 minute until they blacken but do not burn.
3. Remove the chilies with a slotted spoon and set aside.
4. Increase the heat to medium-high. Add the chicken strips and stir fry until cooked through, about 2 minutes.
5. Add the onion wedges and stir fry for 1 minute.
6. Stir in the fish sauce, soy sauce, and sugar. Continue frying for another 1 minute.
7. Add the cashews and reserved chilies back to the wok. Stir well to combine.
8. Transfer the dish to a serving platter and serve hot or warm.
